arabic: حَدَّثَنَا سَهْلُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ، عَنْ عَمْرٍو، عَنِ الْحَسَنِ، أَنَّ عُمَرَ، حَيْثُ أَمَرَ أُبَيًّا أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ بِالنَّاسِ فِي رَمَضَانَ، وَأَمَرَهُ أَنْ يَقْنُتَ بِهِمْ فِي النِّصْفِ الْبَاقِي، لَيْلَةَ سِتَّ عَشْرَةَ قَالَ: وَكَانَ الْحَسَنُ يَقُولُ: إِذَا كَانَ إِمَامًا قَنَتَ فِي النِّصْفِ، وَإِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ إِمَامًا قَنَتَ الشَّهْرَ كُلَّهُ

english.narrator: Sahl ibn Yūsuf → ‘Amr → Al-Ḥasan → ‘Umar
english.text: Sahl ibn Yūsuf narrated to us, from ‘Amr, from Al-Ḥasan, that ‘Umar, when he ordered Ubayy to lead the people in prayer in Ramadan, ordered him to perform Qunut with them in the remaining half, on the sixteenth night. He said: And Al-Ḥasan used to say: “If he is an Imam, he performs Qunut in the [last] half, and if he is not an Imam, he performs Qunut the entire month.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو خَالِدٍ الْأَحْمَرُ، عَنْ أَشْعَثَ، عَنِ الْحَكَمِ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ: لَا يَقْنُتُ السَّنَةَ كُلَّهَا فِي الْفَجْرِ، وَيَقْنُتُ فِي الْوَتْرِ، كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ قَبْلَ الرُّكُوعِ، قَالَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ: هَذَا الْقَوْلُ عِنْدَنَا

english.narrator: Abū Khālid al-Aḥmar → Ash‘ath → Al-Ḥakam → Ibrāhīm → ‘Abd Allāh
english.text: Abū Khālid al-Aḥmar narrated to us, from Ash‘ath, from Al-Ḥakam, from Ibrāhīm, that ‘Abd Allāh said: “Do not perform Qunut throughout the year in Fajr, but perform Qunut in Witr every night before bowing.” Abū Bakr said: “This is the saying according to us.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ، عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ، عَنْ هِشَامٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْحَارِثِ بْنِ هِشَامٍ، عَنْ عَلِيٍّ، "أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ كَانَ يَقُولُ فِي آخِرِ وَتْرِهِ: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ، وَأَعُوذُ بِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْكَ لَا أُحْصِي ثَنَاءً عَلَيْكَ، أَنْتَ كَمَا أَثْنَيْتَ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ

english.narrator: Abū Bakr → Yazīd ibn Hārūn → Ḥammād ibn Salamah → Hishām → ‘Abd al-Raḥmān ibn al-Ḥārith ibn Hishām → ‘Alī
english.text: Abū Bakr narrated to us, saying: Yazīd ibn Hārūn narrated to us, from Ḥammād ibn Salamah, from Hishām, from ‘Abd al-Raḥmān ibn al-Ḥārith ibn Hishām, from ‘Alī, that the Prophet ﷺ used to say at the end of his Witr: “O Allah, I seek refuge in Your pleasure from Your anger, and in Your forgiveness from Your punishment, and I seek refuge in You from You. I cannot count Your praises; You are as You have praised Yourself.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ، عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ التَّيْمِيِّ، عَنْ رَجُلٍ، عَنْ أَبِي الْمُحَزِّمِ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، قَالَ: نَزَلْتُ عَلَيْهِ عَشْرَ سِنِينَ فَمَا رَأَيْتُهُ قَنَتَ فِي وَتْرِهِ

english.narrator: Abū Bakr → Yazīd ibn Hārūn → Sulaymān al-Taymī → A man → Abū al-Muḥazzim → Abū Hurayrah
english.text: Abū Bakr narrated to us, saying: Yazīd ibn Hārūn narrated to us, from Sulaymān al-Taymī, from a man, from Abū al-Muḥazzim, from Abū Hurayrah, who said: “I stayed with him for ten years and never saw him perform Qunut in his Witr.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ نُمَيْرٍ، عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ، عَنْ نَافِعٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ، أَنَّهُ كَانَ لَا يَقْنُتُ فِي الْفَجْرِ، وَلَا فِي الْوَتْرِ، فَكَانَ إِذَا سُئِلَ عَنِ الْقُنُوتِ، قَالَ: مَا نَعْلَمُ الْقُنُوتَ، إِلَّا طُولَ الْقِيَامِ وَقِرَاءَةَ الْقُرْآنِ

english.narrator: ‘Abd Allāh ibn Numayr → ‘Ubayd Allāh ibn ‘Umar → Nāfi‘ → Ibn ‘Umar
english.text: ‘Abd Allāh ibn Numayr narrated to us, from ‘Ubayd Allāh ibn ‘Umar, from Nāfi‘, from Ibn ‘Umar, that he did not perform Qunut in Fajr or Witr. When asked about Qunut, he said: “We do not know Qunut except as prolonged standing and recitation of the Qur’an.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ، عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مُرَّةَ، عَنْ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: إِنَّمَا الْوَتْرُ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْقُرْآنِ

english.narrator: Abū Mu‘āwiyah → Al-A‘mash → ‘Amr ibn Murrah → Abū ‘Ubaydah
english.text: Abū Mu‘āwiyah narrated to us, from Al-A‘mash, from ‘Amr ibn Murrah, from Abū ‘Ubaydah, who said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: “Witr is only upon the people of the Qur’an.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ، عَنْ مِسْعَرٍ، عَنْ حَمَّادٍ، قَالَ: إِذَا سَهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ يَقْنُتَ، فَلْيَسْجُدْ سَجْدَتَيِ السَّهْوِ يَعْنِي فِي الْوَتْرِ

english.narrator: Abū Bakr → Yazīd ibn Hārūn → Mis‘ar → Ḥammād
english.text: Abū Bakr narrated to us, saying: Yazīd ibn Hārūn narrated to us, from Mis‘ar, from Ḥammād, who said: “If he forgets to perform Qunut, let him perform the two prostrations of forgetfulness,” meaning in Witr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ السَّلَامِ بْنُ حَرْبٍ، عَنْ لَيْثٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْأَسْوَدِ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، أَنَّ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ مَسْعُودٍ، كَانَ إِذَا فَرَغَ مِنَ الْقِرَاءَةِ كَبَّرَ ثُمَّ قَنَتَ، فَإِذَا فَرَغَ مِنَ الْقُنُوتِ، كَبَّرَ ثُمَّ رَكَعَ

english.narrator: Abū Bakr → ‘Abd al-Salām ibn Ḥarb → Layth → ‘Abd al-Raḥmān ibn al-Aswad → His Father → ‘Abd Allāh ibn Mas‘ūd
english.text: Abū Bakr narrated to us, saying: ‘Abd al-Salām ibn Ḥarb narrated to us, from Layth, from ‘Abd al-Raḥmān ibn al-Aswad, from his father, that ‘Abd Allāh ibn Mas‘ūd, when he finished reciting, would say Takbīr then perform Qunut. When he finished Qunut, he would say Takbīr then bow.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْأَحْوَصِ، عَنْ مُغِيرَةَ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: إِذَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ تَقْنُتَ، فَكَبِّرْ لِلْقُنُوتِ، وَكَبِّرْ إِذَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ تَرْكَعَ

english.narrator: Abū al-Aḥwaṣ → Mughīrah → Ibrāhīm
english.text: Abū al-Aḥwaṣ narrated to us, from Mughīrah, from Ibrāhīm, who said: “If you want to perform Qunut, say Takbīr for Qunut, and say Takbīr when you want to bow.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا حَفْصٌ، عَنْ حَجَّاجٍ، عَنْ أَبِي مَعْشَرٍ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، أَنَّهُ كَانَ يُكَبِّرُ إِذَا قَنَتَ، وَيُكَبِّرُ إِذَا فَرَغَ

english.narrator: Ḥafṣ → Ḥajjāj → Abū Ma‘shar → Ibrāhīm
english.text: Ḥafṣ narrated to us, from Ḥajjāj, from Abū Ma‘shar, from Ibrāhīm, that he used to say Takbīr when he performed Qunut, and say Takbīr when he finished.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ، عَنْ مُغِيرَةَ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: إِذَا فَرَغْتَ مِنَ الْقِرَاءَةِ فَكَبِّرْ، ثُمَّ إِذَا فَرَغْتَ فَكَبِّرْ، وَارْكَعْ

english.narrator: Hushaym → Mughirah → Ibrahim
english.text: Hushaym narrated to us from Mughirah, from Ibrahim, who said: “When you finish the recitation, say the Takbir; then when you finish [Qunut], say the Takbir and bow.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا غُنْدَرٌ، عَنْ شُعْبَةَ، قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ الْحَكَمَ، وَحَمَّادًا، وَأَبَا إِسْحَاقَ، يَقُولُونَ فِي قُنُوتِ الْوَتْرِ: إِذَا فَرَغَ، كَبَّرَ ثُمَّ قَنَتَ

english.narrator: Ghundar → Shu‘bah → Al-Hakam/Hammad/Abu Ishaq
english.text: Ghundar narrated to us from Shu‘bah, who said: I heard Al-Hakam, Hammad, and Abu Ishaq say regarding the Qunut of Witr: “When he finishes [recitation], he says the Takbir and then performs Qunut.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْأَحْوَصِ، عَنْ مُغِيرَةَ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: ارْفَعْ يَدَيْكَ لِلْقُنُوتِ

english.narrator: Abu Bakr → Abu al-Ahwas → Mughirah → Ibrahim
english.text: Abu Bakr narrated to us, saying: Abu al-Ahwas narrated to us from Mughirah, from Ibrahim, who said: “Raise your hands for Qunut.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنْ لَيْثٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْأَسْوَدِ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، أَنَّهُ كَانَ يَرْفَعُ يَدَيْهِ فِي قُنُوتِ الْوَتْرِ

english.narrator: Mu‘awiyah ibn Hisham → Sufyan → Layth → ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Aswad → His Father → ‘Abd Allah
english.text: Mu‘awiyah ibn Hisham narrated to us, saying: Sufyan narrated to us from Layth, from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Aswad, from his father, from ‘Abd Allah, that he used to raise his hands during the Qunut of Witr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْمُحَارِبِيُّ، عَنْ لَيْثٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ الْأَسْوَدِ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، أَنَّهُ كَانَ يَرْفَعُ يَدَيْهِ إِذَا قَنَتَ فِي الْوَتْرِ

english.narrator: ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn Muhammad al-Muharibi → Layth → Ibn al-Aswad → His Father → ‘Abd Allah
english.text: ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn Muhammad al-Muharibi narrated to us from Layth, from Ibn al-Aswad, from his father, from ‘Abd Allah, that he used to raise his hands when he performed Qunut in Witr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ، عَنْ مُغِيرَةَ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى الْأَسْوَدِ ذَاتَ لَيْلَةٍ وَهُوَ مَرِيضٌ، فَصَلَّى الْوَتْرَ، وَرَجُلٌ مُسْنِدٌ إِلَيْهِ، قَالَ: فَقَنَتَ فَأَطَالَ الْقُنُوتَ حَتَّى ظَنَنْتُ أَنَّهُ قَدْ زَادَ عَلَى مَا كَانَ يَصْنَعُ

english.narrator: Abu Bakr → Hushaym → Mughirah → Ibrahim
english.text: Abu Bakr narrated to us, saying: Hushaym narrated to us from Mughirah, from Ibrahim, who said: “I entered upon Al-Aswad one night while he was ill. He prayed Witr, with a man supporting him. He performed Qunut and prolonged it until I thought he had exceeded what he usually did.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ، أَنَّهُ كَانَ يَقُومُ بِنَا فِي الْوَتْرِ، قَدْرَ مَا يَقْرَأُ مِائَةَ آيَةٍ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Isma‘il ibn ‘Abd al-Malik → Sa‘id ibn Jubayr
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us from Isma‘il ibn ‘Abd al-Malik, from Sa‘id ibn Jubayr, that he used to stand with us in Witr [performing Qunut] for the duration of reciting one hundred verses.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ سُفْيَانَ، عَنْ مُغِيرَةَ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: يُقَامُ فِي قُنُوتِ الْوَتْرِ قَدْرَ إِذَا السَّمَاءُ انْشَقَّتْ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Sufyan → Mughirah → Ibrahim
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us from Sufyan, from Mughirah, from Ibrahim, who said: “One stands in the Qunut of Witr for the duration of [reciting] Surat Al-Inshiqaq.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُسْهِرٍ، عَنْ عَاصِمٍ، عَنْ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ، أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ عَنْ قُنُوتِ عُمَرَ فِي الْفَجْرِ، فَقَالَ: كَانَ يَقْنُتُ بِقَدْرِ مَا يَقْرَأُ الرَّجُلُ مِائَةَ آيَةٍ

english.narrator: ‘Ali ibn Mushir → ‘Asim → Abu ‘Uthman
english.text: ‘Ali ibn Mushir narrated to us from ‘Asim, from Abu ‘Uthman, that he was asked about the Qunut of ‘Umar in Fajr. He said: “He used to perform Qunut for the duration of a man reciting one hundred verses.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ، قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنَا مُغِيرَةُ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: لَا وَتْرَ إِلَّا بِقُنُوتٍ

english.narrator: Abu Bakr → Hushaym → Mughirah → Ibrahim
english.text: Abu Bakr narrated to us, saying: Hushaym narrated to us, saying: Mughirah informed us from Ibrahim, who said: “There is no Witr without Qunut.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا حَفْصُ بْنُ غِيَاثٍ، عَنْ أَبِي مَالِكٍ الْأَشْجَعِيِّ، قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي: يَا أَبَتِ، صَلَّيْتَ خَلْفَ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ، وَخَلْفَ أَبِي بَكْرٍ، وَعُمَرَ، وَعُثْمَانَ فَهَلْ رَأَيْتَ أَحَدًا مِنْهُمْ يَقْنُتُ؟ فَقَالَ: يَا بُنَيَّ هِيَ مُحْدَثَةٌ

english.narrator: Abu Bakr → Hafs ibn Ghiyath → Abu Malik al-Ashja‘i
english.text: Abu Bakr narrated to us, saying: Hafs ibn Ghiyath narrated to us from Abu Malik al-Ashja‘i, who said: I said to my father: “O my father, you prayed behind the Prophet ﷺ, and behind Abu Bakr, ‘Umar, and ‘Uthman. Did you see any of them perform Qunut?” He said: “O my son, it is an innovation (muhdathah).”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مِسْعَرٌ، عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ غَسَّانَ الْمُرَادِيِّ، عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ، أَنَّ عُمَرَ بْنَ الْخَطَّابِ لَمْ يَقْنُتْ فِي الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Mis‘ar → Yahya ibn Ghassan al-Muradi → ‘Amr ibn Maymun
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Mis‘ar narrated to us from Yahya ibn Ghassan al-Muradi, from ‘Amr ibn Maymun, that ‘Umar ibn al-Khattab did not perform Qunut in Fajr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ إِدْرِيسَ، عَنْ أَبِي مَالِكٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، قَالَ: قُلْتُ لَهُ: صَلَّيْتَ خَلْفَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ، وَأَبِي بَكْرٍ، وَعُمَرَ، وَعُثْمَانَ، أَفَكَانُوا يَقْنُتُونَ؟ فَقَالَ: لَا يَا بُنَيَّ هِيَ مُحْدَثَةٌ

english.narrator: Ibn Idris → Abu Malik → His Father
english.text: Ibn Idris narrated to us from Abu Malik, from his father, who said: I said to him: “You prayed behind the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, Abu Bakr, ‘Umar, and ‘Uthman. Did they perform Qunut?” He said: “No, O my son, it is an innovation.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ إِدْرِيسَ، عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، أَنَّ الْأَسْوَدَ، وَعَمْرَو بْنَ مَيْمُونٍ، أَنَّهُمَا صَلَّيَا خَلْفَ عُمَرَ الْفَجْرَ فَلَمْ يَقْنُتْ

english.narrator: Ibn Idris → Al-Hasan ibn ‘Ubayd Allah → Ibrahim
english.text: Ibn Idris narrated to us from Al-Hasan ibn ‘Ubayd Allah, from Ibrahim, that Al-Aswad and ‘Amr ibn Maymun prayed Fajr behind ‘Umar, and he did not perform Qunut.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ سُفْيَانَ، عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، عَنِ الْأَسْوَدِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ، وَعَمْرِو بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ، أَنَّهُمَا صَلَّيَا خَلْفَ عُمَرَ الْفَجْرَ، فَلَمْ يَقْنُتْ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Sufyan → Mansur → Ibrahim
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us from Sufyan, from Mansur, from Ibrahim, from Al-Aswad ibn Yazid and ‘Amr ibn Maymun, that they prayed Fajr behind ‘Umar, and he did not perform Qunut.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مِسْعَرٌ، عَنْ عُثْمَانَ الثَّقَفِيِّ، عَنْ عَرْفَجَةَ، أَنَّ ابْنَ مَسْعُودٍ، كَانَ لَا يَقْنُتُ فِي الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Mis‘ar → ‘Uthman al-Thaqafi → ‘Arfajah
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Mis‘ar narrated to us from ‘Uthman al-Thaqafi, from ‘Arfajah, that Ibn Mas‘ud did not use to perform Qunut in Fajr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانَ، عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، عَنْ عَلْقَمَةَ بْنِ قَيْسٍ، أَنَّ ابْنَ مَسْعُودٍ، لَمْ يَكُنْ يَقْنُتُ فِي الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Sufyan → Abu Ishaq → ‘Alqamah ibn Qays
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Sufyan narrated to us from Abu Ishaq, from ‘Alqamah ibn Qays, that Ibn Mas‘ud did not use to perform Qunut in Fajr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ، قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنَا مُغِيرَةُ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: كَانَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ لَا يَقْنُتُ فِي صَلَاةِ الصُّبْحِ

english.narrator: Hushaym → Mughirah → Ibrahim
english.text: Hushaym narrated to us, saying: Mughirah informed us from Ibrahim, who said: “`Abd Allah did not perform Qunut in the Fajr prayer.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الْأَعْمَشُ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، عَنْ سُلَيْمٍ أَبِي الشَّعْثَاءِ الْمُحَارِبِيِّ، قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ ابْنَ عُمَرَ عَنِ الْقُنُوتِ فِي الْفَجْرِ، فَقَالَ: فَأَيُّ شَيْءٍ الْقُنُوتُ؟ قُلْتُ: يَقُومُ الرَّجُلُ سَاعَةً بَعْدَ الْقِرَاءَةِ، فَقَالَ ابْنُ عُمَرَ: مَا شَعَرْتُ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Al-A‘mash → Ibrahim → Sulaym Abu al-Sha‘tha’ al-Muharibi
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Al-A‘mash narrated to us from Ibrahim, from Sulaym Abu al-Sha‘tha’ al-Muharibi, who said: I asked Ibn ‘Umar about Qunut in Fajr. He said: “And what is Qunut?” I said: “A man stands for a while after recitation.” Ibn ‘Umar said: “I never knew of it.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنْ وَاقِدٍ، مَوْلَى زَيْدِ بْنِ خُلَيْدَةَ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، وَابْنِ عُمَرَ أَنَّهُمَا كَانَا لَا يَقْنُتَانِ فِي الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Sufyan → Waqid → Sa‘id ibn Jubayr → Ibn ‘Abbas/Ibn ‘Umar
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Sufyan narrated to us from Waqid, the freed slave of Zayd ibn Khulagdah, from Sa‘id ibn Jubayr, from Ibn ‘Abbas and Ibn ‘Umar, that they did not perform Qunut in Fajr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا رَوْحُ بْنُ عُبَادَةَ، عَنْ زَكَرِيَّا بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي عَمْرُو بْنُ دِينَارٍ، أَنَّ ابْنَ الزُّبَيْرِ صَلَّى بِهِمِ الصُّبْحَ فَلَمْ يَقْنُتْ

english.narrator: Rawh ibn ‘Ubadah → Zakariyya ibn Ishaq → ‘Amr ibn Dinar
english.text: Rawh ibn ‘Ubadah narrated to us from Zakariyya ibn Ishaq, who said: ‘Amr ibn Dinar narrated to me that Ibn al-Zubayr led them in the Fajr prayer and did not perform Qunut.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي خَالِدٍ، عَنْ أَبِي الضُّحَى، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ، أَنَّ عُمَرَ كَانَ لَا يَقْنُتُ فِي الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Ibn Abi Khalid → Abu al-Duha → Sa‘id ibn Jubayr
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Ibn Abi Khalid narrated to us from Abu al-Duha, from Sa‘id ibn Jubayr, that ‘Umar did not use to perform Qunut in Fajr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الْأَعْمَشُ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، أَنَّ عُمَرَ بْنَ الْخَطَّابِ كَانَ لَا يَقْنُتُ فِي الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Al-A‘mash → Ibrahim
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Al-A‘mash narrated to us from Ibrahim, that ‘Umar ibn al-Khattab did not use to perform Qunut in Fajr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ إِسْرَائِيلَ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى، عَنْ طَلْحَةَ، أَنَّ أَبَا بَكْرٍ لَمْ يَقْنُتْ فِي الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Isra’il → Ibrahim ibn ‘Abd al-A‘la → Talhah
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us from Isra’il, from Ibrahim ibn ‘Abd al-A‘la, from Talhah, that Abu Bakr did not perform Qunut in Fajr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ مِسْعَرٍ، عَنْ يَزِيدَ الْفَقِيرِ، قَالَ: صَلَّيْتُ خَلْفَ ابْنِ عُمَرَ الْفَجْرَ، فَلَمْ يَقْنُتْ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Mis‘ar → Yazid al-Faqir
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us from Mis‘ar, from Yazid al-Faqir, who said: “I prayed Fajr behind Ibn ‘Umar, and he did not perform Qunut.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ، قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنَا حُصَيْنٌ، عَنْ عِمْرَانَ بْنِ الْحَارِثِ، قَالَ: صَلَّيْتُ مَعَ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ فِي دَارِهِ صَلَاةَ الصُّبْحِ، فَلَمْ يَقْنُتْ قَبْلَ الرُّكُوعِ وَلَا بَعْدَهُ

english.narrator: Hushaym → Husayn → ‘Imran ibn al-Harith
english.text: Hushaym narrated to us, saying: Husayn informed us from ‘Imran ibn al-Harith, who said: “I prayed the Fajr prayer with Ibn ‘Abbas in his house, and he did not perform Qunut before bowing nor after it.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ، قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنَا ابْنُ عَوْنٍ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، عَنِ الْأَسْوَدِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ، قَالَ: قَالَ ابْنُ عُمَرَ فِي قُنُوتِ الصُّبْحِ: مَا شَهِدْتُ، وَلَا عَلِمْتُ

english.narrator: Hushaym → Ibn ‘Awn → Ibrahim → Al-Aswad ibn Yazid
english.text: Hushaym narrated to us, saying: Ibn ‘Awn informed us from Ibrahim, from Al-Aswad ibn Yazid, who said: Ibn ‘Umar said regarding Qunut in Fajr: “I did not witness it, nor did I know of it.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ عَوْنٍ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، عَنِ الْأَسْوَدِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ، عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ، أَنَّهُ لَمْ يَعْرِفْ الْقُنُوتَ فِي الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Ibn ‘Awn → Ibrahim → Al-Aswad ibn Yazid → Ibn ‘Umar
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Ibn ‘Awn narrated to us from Ibrahim, from Al-Aswad ibn Yazid, from Ibn ‘Umar, that he did not recognize Qunut in Fajr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا هِشَامٌ الدَّسْتُوَائِيُّ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ، قَالَ: إِنَّمَا قَنَتَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي صَلَاةِ الصُّبْحِ شَهْرًا، بَعْدَ الرُّكُوعِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Hisham al-Dastuwa’i → Qatadah → Anas
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Hisham al-Dastuwa’i narrated to us from Qatadah, from Anas, who said: “The Messenger of Allah ﷺ only performed Qunut in the Fajr prayer for a month, after bowing.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ مُعَاذٍ، عَنِ التَّيْمِيِّ، عَنْ أَبِي مِجْلَزٍ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ، قَالَ: إِنَّمَا قَنَتَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي صَلَاةِ الصُّبْحِ شَهْرًا، يَدْعُو عَلَى رِعْلٍ، وَذَكْوَانَ

english.narrator: Mu‘adh ibn Mu‘adh → Al-Taymi → Abu Mijlaz → Anas
english.text: Mu‘adh ibn Mu‘adh narrated to us from Al-Taymi, from Abu Mijlaz, from Anas, who said: “The Messenger of Allah ﷺ only performed Qunut in the Fajr prayer for a month, invoking curses upon Ri‘l and Dhakwan.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ، عَنْ عَاصِمٍ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ، قَالَ: إِنَّمَا قَنَتَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ شَهْرًا، يَدْعُو عَلَى أُنَاسٍ قَتَلُوا أُنَاسًا مِنْ أَصْحَابِهِ يُقَالُ لَهُمُ الْقُرَّاءُ

english.narrator: Abu Mu‘awiyah → ‘Asim → Anas
english.text: Abu Mu‘awiyah narrated to us from ‘Asim, from Anas, who said: “The Messenger of Allah ﷺ only performed Qunut for a month, invoking curses upon people who killed some of his Companions called the Reciters (Al-Qurra’).”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ، قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنَا عُرْوَةُ الْهَمْدَانِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الشَّعْبِيُّ، قَالَ: لَمَّا قَنَتَ عَلِيٌّ فِي صَلَاةِ الصُّبْحِ، أَنْكَرَ النَّاسُ ذَلِكَ، قَالَ: فَقَالَ: إِنَّمَا اسْتَنْصَرْنَا عَلَى عَدُوِّنَا

english.narrator: Hushaym → ‘Urwah al-Hamdani → Al-Sha‘bi
english.text: Hushaym narrated to us, saying: ‘Urwah al-Hamdani informed us, saying: Al-Sha‘bi narrated to us, saying: When ‘Ali performed Qunut in the Fajr prayer, the people disapproved of that. He said: “We only sought victory against our enemy.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ قَيْسٍ، عَنْ عَامِرٍ الْجُهَنِيِّ، أَنَّ عُمَرَ بْنَ الْخَطَّابِ كَانَ لَا يَقْنُتُ فِي الْفَجْرِ وَقَالَ عَامِرٌ: مَا كَانَ الْقُنُوتُ حَتَّى جَاءَ أَهْلُ الشَّامِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Muhammad ibn Qays → ‘Amir al-Juhani
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Muhammad ibn Qays narrated to us from ‘Amir al-Juhani, that ‘Umar ibn al-Khattab did not use to perform Qunut in Fajr. And ‘Amir said: “Qunut did not exist until the people of Sham came.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ قَيْسٍ، عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ، قَالَ: قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ: لَوْ أَنَّ النَّاسَ سَلَكُوا وَادِيًا وَشِعْبًا، وَسَلَكَ عُمَرُ وَادِيًا وَشِعْبًا، سَلَكْتُ وَادِيَ عُمَرَ وَشِعْبَهُ، وَلَوْ قَنَتَ عُمَرُ، قَنَتَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Muhammad ibn Qays → Al-Sha‘bi
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Muhammad ibn Qays narrated to us from Al-Sha‘bi, who said: `Abd Allah said: “If the people took a valley and a path, and ‘Umar took a valley and a path, I would take the valley and path of ‘Umar. And if ‘Umar performed Qunut, `Abd Allah would perform Qunut.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ، قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو بِشْرٍ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ، أَنَّهُ كَانَ لَا يَقْنُتُ فِي صَلَاةِ الصُّبْحِ

english.narrator: Hushaym → Abu Bishr → Sa‘id ibn Jubayr
english.text: Hushaym narrated to us, saying: Abu Bishr informed us from Sa‘id ibn Jubayr, that he did not use to perform Qunut in the Fajr prayer.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانَ، عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو، عَنْ فُضَيْلٍ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: إِنَّمَا قَنَتَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَيَّامًا

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Sufyan → Al-Hasan ibn ‘Amr → Fudayl → Ibrahim
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Sufyan narrated to us from Al-Hasan ibn ‘Amr, from Fudayl, from Ibrahim, who said: “The Messenger of Allah ﷺ only performed Qunut for a few days.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مِسْعَرٌ، عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مَسْعُودٍ: قَدْ عَلِمُوا أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ، إِنَّمَا قَنَتَ شَهْرًا

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Mis‘ar → Abu Hamzah → Ibrahim
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Mis‘ar narrated to us from Abu Hamzah, from Ibrahim, who said: `Abd Allah ibn Mas‘ud said: “They knew that the Prophet ﷺ only performed Qunut for a month.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مِسْعَرٌ، عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مُرَّةَ، قَالَ: صَلَّيْتُ خَلْفَ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ الْفَجْرَ، فَلَمْ يَقْنُتْ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Mis‘ar → ‘Amr ibn Murrah
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Mis‘ar narrated to us from ‘Amr ibn Murrah, who said: “I prayed Fajr behind Sa‘id ibn Jubayr, and he did not perform Qunut.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ مُوسَى بْنِ نَافِعٍ، قَالَ: صَلَّيْتُ خَلْفَ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ، الْفَجْرَ فَلَمْ يَقْنُتْ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Musa ibn Nafi‘
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us from Musa ibn Nafi‘, who said: “I prayed Fajr behind Sa‘id ibn Jubayr, and he did not perform Qunut.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَرْوَانُ بْنُ مُعَاوِيَةَ، عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ التَّيْمِيِّ، عَنْ شَيْخٍ، أَنَّهُ صَلَّى خَلْفَ عُثْمَانَ، فَلَمْ يَقْنُتْ

english.narrator: Marwan ibn Mu‘awiyah → Sulayman ibn al-Taymi → A Shaykh
english.text: Marwan ibn Mu‘awiyah narrated to us from Sulayman ibn al-Taymi, from a Shaykh, that he prayed behind ‘Uthman and he did not perform Qunut.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَرْوَانُ بْنُ مُعَاوِيَةَ، عَنِ التَّيْمِيِّ، عَنْ أَبِي مِجْلَزٍ، قَالَ: صَلَّيْتُ خَلْفَ ابْنِ عُمَرَ، فَلَمْ يَقْنُتْ قَبْلَ الرُّكُوعِ وَلَا بَعْدَهُ

english.narrator: Marwan ibn Mu‘awiyah → Al-Taymi → Abu Mijlaz
english.text: Marwan ibn Mu‘awiyah narrated to us from Al-Taymi, from Abu Mijlaz, who said: “I prayed behind Ibn ‘Umar, and he did not perform Qunut before bowing nor after it.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَرْوَانُ بْنُ مُعَاوِيَةَ، عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي إِسْمَاعِيلَ، قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ سَعِيدَ بْنَ جُبَيْرٍ عَنِ الْقُنُوتِ، فَقَالَ: إِذَا قَرَأْتَ فَارْكَعْ

english.narrator: Marwan ibn Mu‘awiyah → Muhammad ibn Abi Isma‘il
english.text: Marwan ibn Mu‘awiyah narrated to us from Muhammad ibn Abi Isma‘il, who said: I asked Sa‘id ibn Jubayr about Qunut. He said: “When you recite, then bow.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْرَائِيلُ، عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، قَالَ: ذَاكَرْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ الْقُنُوتَ، فَقَالَ: خَرَجَ عَلِيٌّ مِنْ عِنْدِنَا، وَلَمْ يَقْنُتْ، وَإِنَّمَا قَنَتَ بَعْدَمَا أَتَاكُمْ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Isra’il → Abu Ishaq
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Isra’il narrated to us from Abu Ishaq, who said: I discussed Qunut with Abu Ja‘far. He said: “`Ali left us and did not perform Qunut; he only performed Qunut after he came to you.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا حُسَيْنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ، عَنْ زَائِدَةَ، عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ، وَسُلَيْمَانِ، قَالَا: كَانَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ لَا يَقْنُتُ فِي صَلَاةِ الْفَجْرِ وَهُوَ إِمَامٌ

english.narrator: Husayn ibn ‘Ali → Za’idah → Al-Hasan ibn ‘Ubayd Allah/Sulayman
english.text: Husayn ibn ‘Ali narrated to us from Za’idah, from Al-Hasan ibn ‘Ubayd Allah and Sulayman, who both said: “Ibrahim did not use to perform Qunut in the Fajr prayer while he was an Imam.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا حُسَيْنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ، عَنْ زَائِدَةَ، عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي مُجَاهِدٍ، وَسَعِيدُ بْنُ جُبَيْرٍ، أَنَّ ابْنَ عَبَّاسٍ كَانَ لَا يَقْنُتُ فِي صَلَاةِ الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Husayn ibn ‘Ali → Za’idah → Mansur
english.text: Husayn ibn ‘Ali narrated to us from Za’idah, from Mansur, who said: Mujahid and Sa‘id ibn Jubayr narrated to me that Ibn ‘Abbas did not use to perform Qunut in the Fajr prayer.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ، عَنْ أَبِي بِشْرٍ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ، أَنَّهُ كَانَ لَا يَقْنُتُ فِي صَلَاةِ الصُّبْحِ

english.narrator: Hushaym → Abu Bishr → Sa‘id ibn Jubayr
english.text: Hushaym narrated to us from Abu Bishr, from Sa‘id ibn Jubayr, that he did not use to perform Qunut in the Fajr prayer.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْرَائِيلُ، عَنْ جَابِرٍ، عَنْ عَامِرٍ، قَالَ: لَمْ يَقْنُتْ أَبُو بَكْرٍ، وَلَا عُمَرُ فِي الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Al-A‘mash → Isra’il → Jabir → ‘Amir
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us from Al-A‘mash, who said: Isra’il narrated to us from Jabir, from ‘Amir, who said: “Neither Abu Bakr nor ‘Umar performed Qunut in Fajr.”

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، عَنْ أَبِي الشَّعْثَاءِ، عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ، أَنَّهُ كَانَ لَا يَفْعَلُهُ، يَعْنِي الْقُنُوتَ فِي الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Al-A‘mash → Ibrahim → Abu al-Sha‘tha’ → Ibn ‘Umar
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us from Al-A‘mash, from Ibrahim, from Abu al-Sha‘tha’, from Ibn ‘Umar, that he did not use to do it—meaning Qunut in Fajr.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، وَشُعْبَةُ، عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مُرَّةَ، عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي لَيْلَى، عَنِ الْبَرَاءِ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَنَتَ فِي الْفَجْرِ، وَالْمَغْرِبِ

english.narrator: Abu Bakr → Waki‘ → Sufyan/Shu‘bah → ‘Amr ibn Murrah → Ibn Abi Layla → Al-Bara’
english.text: Abu Bakr narrated to us, saying: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Sufyan and Shu‘bah narrated to us from ‘Amr ibn Murrah, from Ibn Abi Layla, from Al-Bara’, that the Prophet ﷺ performed Qunut in Fajr and Maghrib.

arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا فِطْرٌ، عَنْ عَطَاءٍ، أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَنَتَ فِي الْفَجْرِ

english.narrator: Waki‘ → Fitr → ‘Ata’
english.text: Waki‘ narrated to us, saying: Fitr narrated to us from ‘Ata’, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ performed Qunut in Fajr.
